title: Volume of Section 28 recordings by year
body: "Information in this release shows the volume of Section 28 recordings from January 2021 to December 2024. Section 28 evidence can be used in some cases.  This is where evidence is pre-recorded in advance of a trial for vulnerable complainants of a crime, as well as witnesses, including children.               Volume of Section 28 recordings by year, 1 January 2021 to 31 December 2024    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 20.8 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email hmctsforms@justice.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.     "
